parameters.url: ={{ 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent('*[_type==\"topicCandidate\" && status==\"brief_ready\" && siteSlug==\"' + ($json.siteSlug || $env.SITE_SLUG || '') + '\"]|order(_updatedAt asc)[0...' + Number($env.ARTICLE_BATCH_SIZE || 3) + ']') }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  mutations: [
    {
      create: {
        _type: 'article',
        siteSlug: $json.siteSlug || $env.SITE_SLUG || '',
        title: $json.title,
        slug: { current: $json.slug },
        excerpt: $json.excerpt,
        category: { _type: 'reference', _ref: $json.categoryRef || ('category-' + ($json.siteSlug || $env.SITE_SLUG || '') + '-home-organization') },
        body: $json.body || [],
        faqItems: $json.faqItems || [],
        seoTitle: $json.seoTitle,
        seoDescription: $json.seoDescription,
        status: 'draft',
        qaScore: 0,
        qaFlags: [],
        readTimeMinutes: $json.readTimeMinutes || 0,
        disclaimerVariant: $json.disclaimerVariant || 'general',
        pipelineMode: $json.pipelineMode || 'prepopulate_bulk_direct',
        prepopulateBatchId: $json.prepopulateBatchId || undefined,
        aiMeta: {
          workflowRunId: String($execution.id),
          budgetMode: $json.budgetMode,
          qualityTier: $json.qualityTier,
          textModelDraft: $env.TEXT_MODEL_DRAFT || 'gpt-4.1-mini',
          pipelineMode: $json.pipelineMode || 'prepopulate_bulk_direct',
          sourceTopicQuery: $json.query || '',
          targetKeyword: $json.targetKeyword || '',
          siteSlug: $json.siteSlug || $env.SITE_SLUG || ''
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}) }}
